summary: The diff implements the vast majority of the requested requirements for the knotankey crochet e-commerce site. The backend (main.mo) covers all data types, CRUD, admin passcode, and seeding. The frontend covers all required routes, pages, components, cart system, checkout, admin panel, music toggle, navbar, footer, and visual theme. A few specific acceptance criteria have evidence gaps due to file truncation, but no clearly missing major features were detected.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin functions must return an error variant when passcode is incorrect
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses Runtime.trap() for auth failures instead of returning a typed error variant. The AC explicitly requires 'Functions return an error variant when passcode is incorrect'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Custom order inspiration images must be stored as base64 strings in the backend
missing_requirements.reason: The build constraint states custom order inspiration images must be stored as base64 strings, but the CustomOrderRequest type uses Storage.ExternalBlob for inspirationImage rather than a plain Text base64 field.

hallucinated_features.description: MusicToggle creates the Audio element lazily via JavaScript new Audio() rather than using an HTML audio element in the DOM
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement specifies wiring the toggle to an HTML audio element, but the implementation uses an imperatively created JS Audio object instead.
